---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**
What are you trying to do that HexaCore doesn't support today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like it to do.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Safety note**
If this touches how tools run against targets, describe how it stays within the scope/approval/
kill-switch model. Requests to run arbitrary commands outside the vetted, gated capability set are
out of scope by design.
